protocol: FunSearch LLM pilot — CPU-first, bounded, pre-registered (operator GO).
target_selection: structural-sweep shortfall cells (where the deterministic baseline fell short), tabulated (has an oracle floor), EXCLUDING Rosin 2026's 24 improved cells; small floors first (most tractable to exceed) + flagship near-miss A(21,6,4). Fixed before running (anti-cherry-pick).
novelty_floor: effective_best_known = max(committed Brouwer snapshot, Rosin 2026). A beat must STRICTLY EXCEED the record and pass the Lean kernel re-check (cwc_check).
stop_rule: Zero kernel-verified beats after the full budget => track CLOSES (record RED, do not silently retry). One kernel-verified beat => STOP, record witness for ADR 0040 carve-out + operator review; GPU/island escalation requires a SEPARATE operator GO.
trust: Programs are UNTRUSTED -> executed only in the funsearch_sandbox. Fitness (verify_cwc) is untrusted. A beat is decided by the Lean kernel + automated oracle, never the LLM. Nothing is promulgated by the pilot.
